title: Routines
subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.

advanced.title: Advanced delivery settings
advanced.description: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.

descriptions.coalesce_if_active: Keep one follow-up run queued while an active run is still working.
descriptions.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if several runs stack up.
descriptions.skip_if_active: Drop overlapping trigger occurrences while the routine is already active.

descriptions.skip_missed: Ignore schedule windows that were missed while the routine or scheduler was paused.
descriptions.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

composer.description: Define the recurring work first. Trigger setup comes next on the detail page.
composer.footer: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup for schedules, webhooks, or internal runs.

empty.selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
empty.noRoutines: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.

created.title: Routine created
created.body: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.

updateFailed.title: Failed to update routine
updateFailed.body: Paperclip could not update the routine.

runFailed.title: Routine run failed
runFailed.body: Paperclip could not start the routine run.

saveFailed.title: Failed to save routine
saveFailed.body: Paperclip could not save the routine.

addTriggerFailed.title: Failed to add trigger
addTriggerFailed.body: Paperclip could not create the trigger.

updateTriggerFailed.title: Failed to update trigger
updateTriggerFailed.body: Paperclip could not update the trigger.

deleteTriggerFailed.title: Failed to delete trigger
deleteTriggerFailed.body: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.

rotateWebhookSecretFailed.title: Failed to rotate webhook secret
rotateWebhookSecretFailed.body: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.

signingModeDescriptions.bearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signingModeDescriptions.hmac_sha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.

secret.saveNowHint: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
